nodes.name: Transcribe / Read Transcript
nodes.notes: Reads .txt transcript or uses Whisper for audio.

nodes.name: Extract Account Info
nodes.notes: Extracts structured business info into account memo JSON.

nodes.name: Generate Retell Agent Spec
nodes.notes: Generates Retell-compatible conversation flow agent config.

parameters.jsCode:
const item = $input.first().json;
return [{ json: { ...item, v1_saved: true, v1_memo_path: 'outputs/accounts/' + item.accountId + '/v1/memo.json', v1_agent_path: 'outputs/accounts/' + item.accountId + '/v1/agent_spec.json', pipeline_a_status: 'complete' } }];

nodes.name: Apply Onboarding Updates
nodes.notes: Applies onboarding patches to v1, generates v2 memo + changelog.

nodes.name: Generate v2 Agent Spec
nodes.notes: Generate updated Retell agent spec from v2 memo.

parameters.jsCode:
const item = $input.first().json;
return [{ json: { account_id: item.accountId, company: item.company, total_changes: item.changes ? item.changes.length : 0, changes: item.changes || [], diff_report_path: 'outputs/accounts/' + item.accountId + '/diff_report.html', changelog_path: 'changelog/' + item.accountId + '_changes.md', pipeline_status: 'COMPLETE', completed_at: new Date().toISOString() } }];

nodes.name: Generate Diff Report
nodes.notes: Generate diff report showing v1 vs v2 changes.
